title: Token generation (amu_xxx.yyy format)
acceptance_criteria: POST /api/v1/auth/agents/{name}/tokens: generates new token for existing agent
Token stored as SHA-256 hash in auth_tokens (original never stored)
GET /api/v1/auth/agents/{name}/tokens: lists tokens (no secrets, metadata only: token_id, created_at, last_used_at, status)
Multiple tokens per agent allowed (previous tokens stay valid)
